scripts.postinstall: node -e "const sqljs=require('sql.js');const fs=require('fs');const db=new sqljs.Database();db.run(\"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS zones (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, bundles TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]')\");db.run(\"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS state (bundle_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, person_name TEXT, taken_at INTEGER, comment TEXT DEFAULT '')\");const data=db.export();fs.writeFileSync('keytracker.db', Buffer.from(data));console.log('DB initialized')"
